surface_symptom: Direct invocation of the MCP knowledge tool returned 6 pitfalls for (kratos, poisson) with no [Category] prefix and no Signal: clause — i.e. the pre-Table-1 prose. A fresh-process load of load_all_backends + backend.get_knowledge('poisson') returned 7 pitfalls, including the new [API] entry and all Signal: clauses. Same machine, same repo, same commit.
root_cause: The MCP server (FastMCP child process started by Claude Code at session connect) imports KNOWLEDGE dicts at startup time and does not reload them. KNOWLEDGE is captured at first import — every subsequent get_knowledge call returns the snapshot. Catalog edits in src/backends/*/generators/<physics>.py become visible only after the MCP host (Claude Code) is restarted. Aliases the long-running session as a stale knowledge surface for hours or days of audit work.
pitfall_db_entries: [Integration] MCP knowledge tool (mcp__open-fem-agent__knowledge) returns the catalog snapshot from MCP-server STARTUP time, NOT the current on-disk catalog. Any edits in src/backends/<be>/generators/<physics>.py committed AFTER the MCP host process began will be silently invisible until the host (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) is restarted. Signal: a fresh `.venv/bin/python scripts/audit_mcp_alignment.py <be> <physics>` returns a pitfall_count higher than the MCP knowledge tool returns for the same (be, physics) pair, AND the first_pitfall_prefix from the audit script starts with [Category] but the MCP-returned strings do not. Workaround: restart the MCP host to pick up catalog edits.
agent_detection_after_fix: scripts/audit_mcp_alignment.py now exists; running it in a fresh Python process produces an authoritative catalog snapshot the user can diff against MCP output. The discrepancy implies a stale MCP session and the user knows to restart. A future improvement is task #62: add an explicit MCP-side reload_catalog tool that re-imports the backend KNOWLEDGE modules.
source_refs: Probe iteration 2026-06-01 sixth tick — mcp__open-fem-agent__knowledge(kratos, poisson) returned 6 pre-Table-1 prose pitfalls; load_all_backends+get_knowledge returned 7 incl. the new [API] entry from commit 78bcb3d.

src/backends/kratos/backend.py:207-219 — get_knowledge prefers data/kratos_knowledge.KRATOS_KNOWLEDGE if importable, else falls back to KNOWLEDGE.get(physics, {}). In practice the import fails (data/kratos_knowledge.py exports KRATOS_APPLICATIONS, CONVECTION_DIFFUSION, etc. — not a KRATOS_KNOWLEDGE name) so the generator KNOWLEDGE is the live source.
commit 78bcb3d — kratos poisson CDA element-surface Table-1 entry + Tier-2 + install gap
